# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Simple User Authentication
Description: Handles user registration and login authentication with password hashing and verification.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: ChatGPT
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Simple_User_Authentication_Plugin {
    const TABLE_SLUG = 'sua_users';

    public function __construct() {
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'admin_menu'));
        add_action('admin_post_sua_register_user', array($this, 'handle_register'));
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_sua_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('admin_post_sua_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
    }

    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;

        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_SLUG;

        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php';

        $sql = "CREATE TABLE {$table_name} (
            id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL,
            email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
            password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) {$charset_collate};";

        dbDelta($sql);
    }

    public function admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'Simple Auth',
            'Simple Auth',
            'manage_options',
            'simple-auth',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-lock',
            80
        );
    }

    public function admin_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die('Unauthorized');
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['sua_message'])) {
            $message = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['sua_message']));
        }

        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1>Simple User Authentication</h1>
            <?php if ($message): ?>
                <div class="notice notice-info"><p><?php echo esc_html($message); ?></p></div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <h2>Register User</h2>
            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php')); ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="sua_register_user">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('sua_register_user_action', 'sua_register_nonce'); ?>
                <table class="form-table">
                    <tr>
                        <th><label for="sua_username">Username</label></th>
                        <td><input name="username" id="sua_username" type="text" class="regular-text" required></td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th><label for="sua_email">Email</label></th>
                        <td><input name="email" id="sua_email" type="email" class="regular-text" required></td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th><label for="sua_password">Password</label></th>
                        <td><input name="password" id="sua_password" type="password" class="regular-text" required></td>
                    </tr>
                </table>
                <?php submit_button('Register User'); ?>
            </form>

            <h2>Login User</h2>
            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php')); ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="sua_login_user">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('sua_login_user_action', 'sua_login_nonce'); ?>
                <table class="form-table">
                    <tr>
                        <th><label for="sua_login_username">Username or Email</label></th>
                        <td><input name="login" id="sua_login_username" type="text" class="regular-text" required></td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th><label for="sua_login_password">Password</label></th>
                        <td><input name="password" id="sua_login_password" type="password" class="regular-text" required></td>
                    </tr>
                </table>
                <?php submit_button('Login User'); ?>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    public function handle_register() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die('Unauthorized');
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['sua_register_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sua_register_nonce'])), 'sua_register_user_action')) {
            wp_die('Invalid nonce');
        }

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_SLUG;

        $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? sanitize_user(wp_unslash($_POST['username']), true) : '';
        $email = isset($_POST['email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['email'])) : '';
        $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['password']) : '';

        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('All fields are required.');
        }

        if (!is_email($email)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Invalid email address.');
        }

        $exists = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s", $username, $email));
        if ($exists) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('User already exists.');
        }

        $password_hash = wp_hash_password($password);

        $inserted = $wpdb->insert(
            $table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password_hash' => $password_hash,
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );

        if ($inserted) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('User registered successfully.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message('Registration failed.');
    }

    public function handle_login() {
        if (!isset($_POST['sua_login_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sua_login_nonce'])), 'sua_login_user_action')) {
            wp_die('Invalid nonce');
        }

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_SLUG;

        $login = isset($_POST['login']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['login'])) : '';
        $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['password']) : '';

        if (empty($login) || empty($password)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('All fields are required.');
        }

        $user = $wpdb->get_row(
            $wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM {$table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s LIMIT 1",
                $login,
                $login
            )
        );

        if (!$user || !wp_check_password($password, $user->password_hash, $user->id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Invalid credentials.');
        }

        wp_set_current_user($user->id);
        wp_set_auth_cookie($user->id, true);

        $this->redirect_with_message('Login successful.');
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($message) {
        $url = add_query_arg('sua_message', rawurlencode($message), admin_url('admin.php?page=simple-auth'));
        wp_safe_redirect($url);
        exit;
    }
}

new Simple_User_Authentication_Plugin();
